headline: How The Caterpillar (CAT) Story Is Shifting As Analysts Reset Valuation And Growth Expectations
summary: The fair value reference point for Caterpillar has been reset from US$754.33 to US$913.29, giving you a fresh anchor for how some models currently frame the stock. Recent analyst reports, including higher price targets and at least one upgrade, link this shift to updated views on what investors may be willing to pay for Caterpillar relative to earnings and long term growth opportunities. As you read on, you will see how these moving targets shape the evolving narrative and what to watch as...
